title: schizodium obliquum subsp. clavigerum
intro: Schizodium obliquum subsp. clavigerum is a subspecies of the Schizodium obliquum plant, also known as the Wild Bergamot or Lemon Balm. It is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Schizodium obliquum subsp. clavigerum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include reduced stress and anxiety, improved sleep quality, and relief from headaches and muscle spasms, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures.
